TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u Tirana ( Hulam a kamu : 地拉那 ) sasayaway akenis i Europe (O-cuo 亞洲) a kanatal u Albania atu Albania hamin nu kitaki a cenci, manamec, nulangaw atu lawa'dan. u Tirana sa i labu nu Europe (O-cuo 歐洲), itiza i 41°19′44″N 19°49′04″E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 1,110 pinhuwankungli , u ahebal nu nanumay sa te'kuk ku 0 pinhuwankungli. hamin nu tademawan sa 557,422, u yadah nu tademaw makaala tu 502 pinhuwankungli nu tademaw. misademiaday kakitizaan sakakikalisiwan macacubelisay binacadan
S.PHON: u tirana ( ħur~ɾam a kamu : *** ) sasajawaj akənis i əuropə (o-ʦuo **) a kanatar~ɾ u ar~ɾbania atu ar~ɾbania ħamin nu kitaki a ʦənʦi, manaməʦ, nur~ɾaŋaw atu r~ɾawaʔ~ʡdan. u tirana sa i r~ɾabu nu əuropə (o-ʦuo **), itiza i *********n *********ə. u aħəbar~ɾ nu r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡaj sa izaw ku *,*** pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi , u aħəbar~ɾ nu nanumaj sa təʔ~ʡkuk ku * pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi. ħamin nu tadəmawan sa ***,***, u jadaħ nu tadəmaw makaar~ɾa tu *** pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi nu tadəmaw. misadəmiadaj kakitizaan sakakikar~ɾisiwan maʦaʦubər~ɾisaj binaʦadan
S.FORM: u Tirana ( Hulam a kamu : 地拉那 ) sasayaway akenis i Europe (O-cuo 亞洲) a kanatal u Albania atu Albania hamin nu kitaki a cenci, manamec, nulangaw atu lawa'dan. u Tirana sa i labu nu Europe (O-cuo 歐洲), itiza i 41°19′44″N 19°49′04″E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 1,110 pinhuwankungli , u ahebal nu nanumay sa te'kuk ku 0 pinhuwankungli. hamin nu tademawan sa 557,422, u yadah nu tademaw makaala tu 502 pinhuwankungli nu tademaw. misademiaday kakitizaan sakakikalisiwan macacubelisay binacadan
